summary: EXP-235 ready. Single substring patch on WIN-025 detail_evidence paragraph 4 that replaces the old "no derived prediction / no derivation from dome geometry" framing with a revised paragraph introducing the dome's scaling equation (δZ = baseline × coverage × FSF) and the FSF = H(r)/r station-to-station ratio, conceding the Pearson r ≈ 0.9999 geometric derivation at the cluster level so that detail_verdict_text's post-EXP-229 FSF retraction has an evidence-level premise to land on. Closes curmudgeon WIN-025 c3 Hole 3 (moderate, evidence/verdict disjointedness). Before-string verified unique (count=1). The monitor.py 2026 forward-prediction detail, the imported-from-2017 baseline critique, and the "relabels as aetheric" closing beat are all preserved. Curmudgeon c3 Hole 1 (major, cluster-wide evolution-log admission), c3 Hole 2 (finding target-drift), and c3 Hole 4 (triple-count closing) are explicitly out of scope; queued for follow-up EXPs per tracker notes.
